channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: iOS 27 Beta 2 Adds Inline Replies to RCS Chats
item.description: Apple's iOS 27 Beta 2 introduces inline replies for RCS chats with Android users, enhancing messaging functionality. Users can now reply directly to specific messages.

item.title: The Hammerhead Karoo Hits Best Price of the Year
item.description: The Hammerhead Karoo cycling computer is now available at its lowest price this year during Amazon Prime Day. It features an impressive touchscreen for navigation.

item.title: Clip-On Frames for Smart Glasses Are Here
item.description: Smart glasses are becoming mainstream, prompting new accessories like clip-on frames from Lorika for Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses. This innovation enhances personalization options.
